title: Sirat · Tarkovsky study
notes: Tarkovsky's long-take grammar applied to the sirat (سراط) crossing — the bridge as edit-free traversal. The cut is the doubt. Steady takes are the proof of faith. Test sequence: Stalker's water-room scene as the moral hinge analog.
